data.title: Trade Desk's Q2 earnings met estimates, revenue guidance in line, stock plunges due to rising Amazon competition.
data.description: Trade Desk reported earnings in line with expectations for the second quarter. However, the company's stock saw a significant drop due to its revenue guidance for the September quarter being on par with estimates. The small beat in revenue was overshadowed by concerns about increasing competition from Amazon.

data.title: Elon Musk shifts Tesla's focus to inference chips for real-time AI, discontinuing Tesla Dojo supercomputer.
data.description: On Thursday, Elon Musk announced that Tesla will concentrate on developing inference chips for instant AI decision-making. The Tesla Dojo Supercomputer has been discontinued as Musk alters the company's chip strategy.

data.title: Windows remains dominant in trading in 2025, with over 70% of desktop and laptop users using it for daily operations.
data.description: In RIGA, Latvia on August 8, 2025, the importance of selecting the right operating system for traders cannot be overstated, impacting various factors such as software compatibility and execution speed. Currently, Windows leads as the preferred system, being utilized by more than 70% of desktop and laptop users for their daily activities.

data.title: Ironman triathlete Dr. Jeffrey L. Reynolds creates inspiring guide "Every Mile Matters" for cancer patients and athletes, promoting resilience.
data.description: "Highlighting the importance of endurance sports in developing life-saving resilience, the "Every Mile Matters" initiative is making a significant impact. Dr. Jeffrey L. Reynolds completed IRONMAN Florida in November 2021, demonstrating the powerful connection between athletes and cancer patients. The event in Commack, N.Y. on August 8, 2025, emphasized how physical challenges like marathons can help individuals overcome adversity. This initiative showcases the ability of endurance sports to instill hope and strength in people, underlining the impact of athletic endeavors on both physical and mental well-being."

data.title: Luxury travel agency Silverwing Travel & Concierge endorsed by Forbes Travel Guide for exceptional industry leadership.
data.description: A prestigious luxury travel company based in Lakewood, New Jersey, Silverwing Travel & Concierge, was recently chosen by Forbes Travel Guide as one of the elite agencies globally. This recognition by Forbes Travel Guide, announced on August 8, 2025, highlights Silverwing Travel & Concierge's exceptional standing in the industry. Known for its expertise and high-end services, Silverwing Travel & Concierge has joined the exclusive group of top agencies acknowledged by FTG for their leadership. This acknowledgment further solidifies Silverwing Travel & Concierge's reputation as a premier player in luxury travel.

data.description: Even with numerous optimistic wagers, the market indicates less than a 3% likelihood of Bitcoin reaching a price of $200,000 by December.

data.title: Crypto is now finding its way into retirement savings, as some 401(k) providers begin offering exposure to digital assets. Exciting times ahead!
data.description: An announcement was made regarding an increase in COVID-19 cases, with a total of 500 new infections reported in the region. This surge brings the total number of cases to 10,000, as authorities continue to implement safety measures to curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, the death toll has reached 150, with 10 new fatalities recorded in the past week. Officials are urging the public to adhere to social distancing guidelines and hygiene protocols to prevent further escalation of the situation.

data.title: China bans promotion of stablecoins to curb speculative behavior. US implements Stablecoin law. Regulators concerned about growth.
data.description: Chinese financial regulators have instructed local brokerages and research organizations to cease the promotion of stablecoins, directing them to cancel events and halt the publication of related studies. This directive was issued in late July and early August as part of a larger campaign by Beijing to address speculation and scams linked to dollar-pegged cryptocurrencies. Sources cited by Bloomberg indicate that authorities recognize the benefits of stablecoins in international finance but are cautious about their unregulated expansion in China. Concerns have been raised about these digital assets, usually supported by traditional currencies... (character count: 999)

data.title: ASEAN imported over $19 billion worth of medical devices globally in 2024, as per Pure Global report.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, in Jersey City, a new study from Pure Global was released regarding the ASEAN MedTech Market. The report, titled "ASEAN MedTech Market Report: An Analysis of Export Trends (2021-2024)," showcases a dynamic and competitive environment. It highlights the growth of intra-regional trade and strong competition within the market. Key findings from the report indicate significant changes in export trends within the ASEAN region over the years studied. The report provides valuable insights into the MedTech market, offering important data and analysis for businesses and stakeholders in this industry.

data.title: MILBERT.AI prevents MFA bypass attacks in real time; 87% of cyberattacks in 2024 involved session hijacking.
data.description: In Las Vegas on August 8, 2025, it was reported that multi-factor authentication has proven to be ineffective. According to data from 2024, a staggering 87% of cyberattacks that resulted in success were attributed to session hijacking following legitimate MFA logins. Notably, state-sponsored entities like Russia's Void Blizzard have been identified utilizing technologies like Evilginx2 to illicitly acquire session tokens in real-time.

data.title: Choice Properties REIT issues $350M Series W and $150M Series X senior unsecured debentures, bearing 4.628% interest rate.
data.description: In Toronto, Choice Properties Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: CHP.UN) disclosed the successful conclusion of their recent private placement Offering in select Canadian provinces. The Trust confirmed the issuance of $350 million in total principal amount for their series W senior unsecured debentures. These debentures carry an interest rate of 4.628% per year and are set to mature on August 8, 2035. Additionally, Choice Properties also issued $15 million in another component of the Offering.

data.title: DatChat rebrands to Myseum, Inc. for social group media sharing. Stock and warrants to trade as "MYSE" and "MYSEW" on Nasdaq on Aug 11, 2025.
data.description: Starting August 11, 2025, Myseum, Inc.'s common stock will be traded on Nasdaq under the symbol "MYSE", while its Series A warrants will be traded under the symbol “MYSEW”.
